sigWerErrors.reason: 'artisim' (my increase) vs 'artisini' (the increase), changes the possessive meaning but the overall intent of the sentence remains clear.
'kartima' (to my card) vs 'kartimdan' (from my card), this reverses the direction of the action and changes the meaning significantly.
